description: Slices or rings of onion coated in batter or crumbs and deep-fried until crisp and golden.
preparation_steps: Slice onions into rings and separate them.
Prepare a batter or breading mixture.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

health_advice.benefits: They can be enjoyable as an occasional side dish and provide some flavor and texture variety.
health_advice.risks: Deep-frying makes them energy-dense and often high in sodium.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Keep portions small or bake or air-fry them for a lighter version.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional onion rings are usually vegetarian. Vegan and gluten-free versions are possible depending on the batter ingredients.

allergens: Gluten unless gluten-free coating is used
popular_regions: Fast food and casual dining restaurants worldwide
